# godaddy Provider

Manage GoDaddy domains, DNS, and selected account-backed domain operations.



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Optional

- `api_key` (String, Sensitive) GoDaddy API key. Falls back to `GODADDY_API_KEY`.
- `api_secret` (String, Sensitive) GoDaddy API secret. Falls back to `GODADDY_API_SECRET`.
- `app_key` (String, Sensitive) Optional app key for subscriptions surfaces.
- `base_url` (String) Optional base URL override, primarily for tests.
- `customer_id` (String) Optional customer ID for v2 APIs. Falls back to `GODADDY_CUSTOMER_ID`.
- `debug_http` (Boolean) Enable redacted HTTP request logging.
- `endpoint` (String) Endpoint selector: `production` or `ote`. Defaults to `production`.
- `market_id` (String) Optional market ID for agreements and subscriptions APIs.
- `max_retries` (Number) Maximum number of retries for retriable requests.
- `poll_interval` (String) Polling interval as a duration like `5s` or integer seconds.
- `rate_limit_rpm` (Number) Per-endpoint rate limit in requests per minute, clamped to 1-60.
- `request_timeout` (String) Request timeout as a duration like `30s` or integer seconds.
- `shopper_id` (String) Optional shopper context. Falls back to `GODADDY_SHOPPER_ID`.
- `user_agent_suffix` (String) Optional suffix appended to the provider user agent.
